articles.author: Tucker  Reals
articles.title: Live Updates: Hegseth says U.S. "just getting started" in Iran war as conflict intensifies and spreads - CBS News
articles.description: The U.S. is "accelerating, not decelerating" war on Iran, Hegseth says, as strikes intensify in the region and reach 1,000 miles away.
articles.content:
Democratic Illinois Gov. JB Pritzker sent a letter Wednesday to Secretary of State Marco Rubio calling for more action from the State Department to help Americans evacuate the Middle East.
